data.title: Litecoin Daily Transactions Surge Amid ETF Developments
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, daily transactions on the Litecoin network have reached $9.6 billion as exchange-traded fund (ETF) issuers move to list their proposed Litecoin ETFs in the United States. This surge in activity has coincided with a significant increase in Litecoin's market capitalization, which rose by 46% from February 2 to February 19, as reported by Santiment on February 21. The report attributes this growth to a strong rise in network utility, with the network processing $9.6 billion in daily transaction volume over the past week.

In late August, Litecoin's daily transaction volume was approximately $2.8 billion, marking a 243% increase over five months. Additionally, Litecoin prices have doubled since early November, surpassing the broader crypto market's gains of 42% during the same period. This growth is partly driven by anticipation surrounding a potential Litecoin ETF, coming 13 months after the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) approved the first Bitcoin ETFs.

The SEC recently acknowledged a rule change to list the CoinShares spot Litecoin ETF on the Nasdaq on February 19. Furthermore, a listing for Canary Capital's Litecoin ETF appeared on the Depository Trust and Clearing Corporation (DTCC) system under the ticker LTCC on February 20. The DTCC plays a crucial role in global financial markets, processing trillions of dollars in securities transactions daily. The Litecoin Foundation noted that this listing is a key preparatory step for the potential launch of the fund.

Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas cautioned that while the listing indicates preparations are underway, it does not guarantee approval or readiness for trading. However, analysts still estimate a 90% chance of approval this year. In response to the DTCC listing, Litecoin prices spiked by approximately 8.5%, rising from an intraday low of $127 to $138 before a slight pullback on February 21. Over the past two weeks, Litecoin has risen nearly 30%, outperforming Bitcoin, which has remained relatively stable since falling back into five figures in early February.

data.title: DeepSeek: Five code libraries will be open sourced next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DeepSeek officially announced that in the next week, it will gradually source 5 code bases, unlock new content every day, and further share new progress. DeepSeek introduced that the current online service modules have been tested and deployed fully and can be put into production environment. The company defines itself as a small company and also stated that every sharing will become a powerful potential energy to accelerate the journey of industry development. It also said that there is no high ivory tower in this field, only the pure garage entrepreneurial spirit and the innovation power built by the community. (Jinshi)

data.title: Litecoin ETF Approval Probability Reaches 85% On Polymarket
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, as of February 21, data from the official website indicates that the probability of a Litecoin ETF being approved this year is currently reported at 85% on Polymarket.

CoinGecko data shows that Litecoin's market capitalization is currently valued at $10.18 billion, ranking it 18th among cryptocurrencies, with a 24-hour increase of 2.4%.

BlockBeats previously reported that at 7 a.m. on February 21, the Canary Litecoin Spot ETF was listed on the DTCC website under the code LTCC, with the creation/redemption section marked as D. Although this listing does not imply any regulatory approval or definitive outcome of the approval process, being listed on the DTCC website is considered a standard procedure for launching a new ETF.

data.title: Musk's X-platform avatar changed, the background includes the words "The Doge Father"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk changed his X profile picture to a picture of a man holding a "golden chainsaw". It is understood that the tool was donated by Argentine President Milley. The words on the back are "The Doge Father".

data.title: Elon Musk Highlights Grok's Potential In Gaming
data.description: According to Foresight News, Elon Musk recently tweeted about a user who created a complete asteroid-style shooting game using Grok with simple commands. Musk noted that by enhancing the graphics resolution, Grok could surpass AAA games in quality. He also mentioned that Grok 3 is already capable of delivering improved NPC dialogues.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Hang Seng Technology Index rose more than 5%, hitting a new 3-year high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Hang Seng Technology Index rose by more than 5%, setting a new 3-year high. The Hang Seng Index rose by 3%; Alibaba (09988.HK) rose by 13%, Bilibili (09626.HK) rose by more than 13%, Lenovo Group (00992.HK) rose by more than 12%, Hua Hong Semiconductor (01347.HK) rose by more than 11%, and SMIC (00981.HK) rose by more than 7%, setting a new record high. (Jinshi)

data.title: Elon Musk wields Javier Milei’s Chainsaw at CPAC 25 to signal government cuts
data.description:
Billionaire Elon Musk appeared before a conservative crowd outside Washington on Thursday and wielded a red chainsaw gifted to him by Argentina’s president, Javier Milei. He accused the Democrats of “treason.” He addressed the Conservative Political Action Conference, pledging to slash government spending and endorsing an audit of the Federal Reserve.  Musk, now seen as […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/elon-musk-javier-mileis-chainsaw-cpac-25/

data.title: Affected by the news of Upbit's listing, JTO rose by more than 20% in a short period of time, breaking through 4 USDT and then falling back
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that affected by the news that Upbit will launch JTO Korean won trading, market data showed that JTO rose in the short term and broke through 4 USDT before falling back, temporarily reporting 3.25 USDT, with a short-term increase of more than 20%.

data.title: PI 24-hour trading volume exceeds 1.2 billion US dollars, and Gate.io's trading share ranks first in the world
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CoinGecko data, PI's daily trading volume exceeded US$1.2 billion. Among them, Gate.io's trading volume exceeded US$540 million, accounting for 44.12% of the trading volume, ranking first in the world.
